items.question: Which home & garden stores offer the highest cashback?
items.answer: Cashback rates vary by store and season. Wayfair often offers up to 8%, Home Depot and Lowe's up to 6%, and Crate & Barrel up to 7%. Check our store listings for current rates.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on furniture delivery fees?
items.answer: Delivery fees are typically not eligible for cashback. However, the cashback applies to the product cost before taxes and delivery charges.

items.question: How long does home & garden cashback take to confirm?
items.answer: Home and garden cashback typically takes 45-90 days to confirm due to longer return periods for furniture and large appliances. This protects against returns and exchanges.

items.question: What happens if I return furniture?
items.answer: If you return an item, the cashback will be deducted from your account. Wait until after the return period to withdraw cashback on large purchases.

items.question: Can I use gift cards with cashback?
items.answer: Yes! You can use gift cards and still earn cashback on the portion paid with the gift card. Just make sure to click through our link first.

items.question: Do assembly services affect my cashback?
items.answer: Assembly fees and installation services are usually not eligible for cashback, but they don't affect the cashback you earn on the product itself.
